name: message-drop-workspace
description: LAN message and file sharing: Node server, web UI, Android app, and CLI.

scripts.verify:phase3: tsx scripts/verify-phase3.ts && pnpm --dir web run build
scripts.verify:phase4: tsx scripts/verify-phase4.ts && pnpm --dir web run build
scripts.verify:all: pnpm run verify:phase1 && pnpm run verify:phase2 && pnpm run verify:phase3 && pnpm run verify:phase4 && pnpm run verify:phase5 && pnpm run verify:phase6 && pnpm run verify:phase7-cli && pnpm run verify:phase8-release-check && pnpm run verify:phase9-open-source && pnpm run verify:phase10-release-workflow
